fail_closed_rules: fixtures with missing provenance stay quarantined or rejected
fixtures with nondeterministic replay stay quarantined until normalized replay passes
fixtures with unresolved security or disclosure uncertainty cannot reach accepted state
ecosystem-facing credibility claims are only publishable for accepted fixtures

triage_priorities.p0-security-or-license: security licensing or disclosure uncertainty blocks acceptance immediately
triage_priorities.p1-replay-break: accepted external evidence no longer replays on the live compiler or runtime path
triage_priorities.p2-normalization-gap: fixture provenance family mapping or replay rooting is incomplete
triage_priorities.p3-publication-gap: publication metadata is incomplete but the fixture is still locally reproducible
